title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at EduComp Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at EduComp Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at EduComp Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About EduComp Solutions:
EduComp Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EduComp Solutions!
